base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of simon_walk — a character from 1987 castlevania ii simons quest. more side-scrolling overworld traversal (RPG-inflected Castlevania). Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: 3-frame walk cycle — more side-scrolling overworld traversal (RPG-inflected Castlevania)
